channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
item.description: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

item.title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
item.description: After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to the studio's staff, Bloomberg reports. The dispute began last year after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds' cofounders, Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, and its CEO, Ted Gill, ahead of a potential […]...

item.title: The 49 Best Outdoor Deals From the REI 4th of July Sale
item.description: Whether you need a tent, sleeping pad, rain jacket, or new pack, REI’s Independence Day sale has something for everyone.

item.title: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
item.description: Microsoft will likely soon follow Sony and stop the production of physical discs for Xbox games. But instead of leaving physical discs behind entirely, sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell me the company has quietly been working on a disc-to-digital feature that will allow Xbox owners to digitize their existing physical game collections. Xbox employees […]...

item.title: Sony’s PlayStation Puts a Nail in Physical Media’s Coffin
item.description: Is PlayStation about to make the same mistake Microsoft made with Xbox One?

item.title: Even Honda is pivoting to data centers
item.description: Honda wants in on the lucrative energy storage market. This week it began producing batteries destined for data centers, not driveways.

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs Senegal: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Kevin De Bruyne & Co. eye progress
item.description: Here's how to watch Belgium vs Senegal for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the Red Devils face the Lions of Teranga in the last 32.

item.title: Are you a YouTube Premium user? You could be paying more than you should be if you’ve subscribed through the Apple App Store
item.description: The Apple tax might be the reason you're paying more for your subscriptions than you should be.

item.title: Exclusive: Blood Message developer describes working on a AAA narrative game as 'every team member's dream' — 'We are all fans of so many great titles, like Uncharted, like The Last of Us'
item.description: A Blood Message developer breaks down some of the inspirations behind the upcoming game.

item.title: T-Mobile and Umbro are dropping an exclusive soccer jersey just in time for the World Cup finals
item.description: T-Mobile and Umbro are dropping a limited-edition soccer jersey on July 7. Here's how to get it on the T-Life app.

item.title: Herschel just launched a Minecraft collab in time for back-to-school shopping. Heres how to buy.
item.description: Shop Herschel Minecraft backpacks, lunch boxes, hats, pencil cases, and more.

item.title: Autonomous vehicle hype is back, and Humble Robotics is bringing it to freight
item.description: The autonomous vehicle space is starting to feel like a repeat of the 2016 hype cycle. Travis Kalanick is back building a robotics company, and the talent wars and capital are heating up the same way they did the first time around. The money’s flowing back, and it’s the people who lived through that first […]

item.title: Publishers can’t control AI answers. They can’t ignore them either
item.description: As Google’s AI summaries become a default layer between publishers and readers, accuracy is no longer just the platform’s problem. Stop me if you’ve heard this one: Google’s AI Overviews are sometimes wrong. This has been a perennial complaint about the Gemini-written summaries that appear at the top of search results since their debut in mid 2024.

item.title: Meta just paywalled a super-useful Ray-Ban smart glasses accessibility feature — and I have 3 reasons why this decision makes zero sense
item.description: Meta’s AI smart glasses users with access to Meta One Premium will now need to pay to get higher conversation focus limit rates.

item.title: My favorite Kindle alternative is $30 off after a recent price increase
item.description: Kobo recently raised the price of its Libra Colour e-reader to $259.99, but today’s deal effectively erases that hike. The company, Best Buy, and Target, are all selling it for its old $229.99 price as part of broader sales, making now one of the best times to grab my favorite alternative to Amazon’s Kindle. If […]

item.title: Penalty Shootouts: Is the Team That Kicks First More Likely to Win?
item.description: Penalty kicks are already proving critical to big wins at this year’s World Cup. But the advantage in penalty kicks has more to do with psychological effects than who kicks first.

item.title: Visa, Mastercard and Coinbase have launched a new global stablecoin
item.description: A new stablecoin venture backed by some big financial institutions is launching.

item.title: On a vu et essayé cette trottinette électrique qui ne pèse que 10 kg et se porte comme un sac à dos
item.description: Alpike est descendu des Alpes autrichiennes vers le salon Eurobike 2026, où nous avons découvert sa trottinette électrique ultra-légère et pliable à l'extrême.

item.title: Fufjilm launches special waterproof and black-and-white editions of its retro QuickSnap instant cameras
item.description: If you really want to get retro, Fujifilm is making some special editions of its classic instant camera.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures ampoules connectées à choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Les ampoules connectées représentent le point de départ idéal pour s’initier à la domotique. Installer un éclairage intelligent chez soi est bien plus facile qu’on ne l’imagine. Découvrez ce notre comparatif les différentes ampoules intelligentes disponibles en 2026.

item.title: « C’est normal que Fiat fasse ça » : le patron de Fiat nous explique pourquoi le Multipla pourrait bien faire son grand retour
item.description: En plus du lancement du Grizzly, son nouveau SUV électrique et hybride, Fiat devrait présenter un concept-car inédit au Mondial de Paris en octobre. Nous en avons discuté avec le CEO de la marque et son directeur produit : l'esprit du célèbre Multipla devrait planer sur le stand.

item.title: Windscribe trolls Mullvad's political donation crisis with a 'scandal' of its own
item.description: Following the revelation that a Mullvad co-founder donated $500,000 to a populist political party, rival provider Windscribe has issued a parody statement "coming clean" about its own CEO's donations, to local dog and cat rescues.

item.title: 'We are not going to sit idly by': video game retailers react to Sony's PlayStation disc axeing announcement
item.description: Video game retailers could be in big trouble, with Sony eliminating physical copies from 2028, and the reaction online is fierce.

item.title: Messy Subnautica 2 saga ends with Unknown Worlds CEO departing again
item.description: Thus ends the messy saga of Subnautica 2.

item.title: Les astronomes tirent la sonnette d’alarme : l’humanité risque de perdre le ciel étoilé pour toujours
item.description: Alors que la Commission fédérale des communications des États-Unis doit se prononcer prochainement sur des projets de mégaconstellations portés par SpaceX et la start-up Reflect Orbital, l'Observatoire européen austral (ESO) hausse le ton. S'appuyant sur une étude scientifique, l'institution...

item.title: Personne n’en parle, et c’est peut-être le meilleur forfait du réseau de SFR actuellement
item.description: À 7,99 euros par mois, ce forfait YouPrice propose 130 Go en 5G sur le réseau de SFR, sans engagement. Un tarif rare sur ce réseau, d'autant que l'offre inclut 18 Go d'itinérance.

item.title: Save $80 on the DeWalt 20V Max Cordless Drill and Impact Driver duo and get more done
item.description: As of July 1, save $80 on the DeWalt 20V Max Cordless Drill and Impact Driver combo kit.

item.title: Lime raises $167M in IPO after years of teasing a public debut
item.description: The nine-year-old scooter and bike-share company has said it needs the funds to help pay down around $1 billion in liabilities.

item.title: En Australie, l’interdiction des réseaux sociaux aux mineurs semble sans effets
item.description: Six mois après son entrée en vigueur, une récente étude vient mesurer les premiers effets de l’interdiction des réseaux sociaux pour les moins de 16 ans en Australie. Une mesure aux résultats discutables loin des objectifs initialement présentés. Un constat qui interroge alors qu’une mesure similaire est à l’étude en France.

item.title: Worried about iPhone price hikes? Apple's new refurbished deals could offer the best value for years — and they now include the iPhone 16e
item.description: Apple is now selling the iPhone 16e on its online store for refurbished devices — and that makes it a very good deal indeed.
